🎵
Tap anywhere
to start music 💕
then it will play automatically 🌸
💌
Hey, you 🌸

I have been holding something in my heart for a while now and today I finally have the courage to say it.

🥺

Every time I see you, my heart does that embarrassing little jump thing.

I have tried to ignore it.
I really have. 😅

✨
Here is why...
  • 🌸 The way you laugh makes everything brighter
  • 🫧 You are soft and kind in a world that forgot how to be
  • ⭐ Thinking about you often makes me smile
  • 🍓 I find myself looking forward to any chance to talk to you, no matter how small
  • 🌷 You make ordinary days feel like a daydream
  • 💫 Simply put you are my favourite person
💝

So after all of this...
I just need to ask you one tiny little question 🥺

and please be gentle with my heart 💕

Will you be mine? 🥺💍

Please say yes. I already practiced my happy dance. 🕺

🌸💕🥺💌✨

(psst the No button is shy 🌸)

Mission Accomplished 🎉
🥳💕🎊

I promise to be your person, your safe place, and your reason to smile every single day. This is just the beginning of something so beautiful. 🌸

You and Me 💌 Forever

💕🌸✨🥰💍🎊
